summary: The discv5 ENR divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in the non-secp256k1 early return; no ENR-to-discv4 peer ID conversion behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 123: M	crates/net/discv5/src/enr.rs.
The isolated patch only changes `return None` to `return None;` when the ENR public key is not secp256k1.
No public-key type check, key encoding, secp256k1 parsing, or PeerId derivation changed.
